name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Standard mutual non-disclosure agreement allowing two parties to share confidential information for a defined purpose, with obligations of protection and permitted exceptions.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Standard agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products, covering access and use, payment, data privacy, termination, indemnification, and liability.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Standard agreement for early product access and design partner programs, where a partner provides feedback to help a provider build and improve a product.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Standard SLA defining uptime and response time commitments for cloud services, including service credit remedies and calculation methods.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Standard agreement for providing and receiving professional services, covering statements of work, deliverables, intellectual property assignment, payment, and indemnification.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Standard GDPR-compliant data processing agreement governing how a service provider processes personal data on behalf of a customer, including subprocessor rules and international transfer mechanisms.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Standard agreement for licensing on-premise or self-hosted software to customers, covering license scope, restrictions, updates, payment, and IP rights.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard co-marketing and business partnership agreement covering mutual obligations, trademark licensing, payment terms, confidentiality, and indemnification.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Standard short-term product trial and evaluation agreement allowing a prospective customer to test a product before committing to a full commercial contract.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Standard HIPAA-compliant business associate agreement governing a service provider's obligations when handling protected health information on behalf of a covered entity.

name: AI Addendum
description: Standard addendum to supplement existing agreements with terms governing the use of AI and machine learning services, covering model training restrictions, IP ownership of outputs, and AI-specific disclaimers.
